nasb.text: He was deeply attracted to Dinah the daughter of Jacob, and he loved the girl and spoke tenderly to her.

esv.text: And his soul was drawn to Dinah the daughter of Jacob. He loved the young woman and spoke tenderly to her.

cnv.text: 示劍的心戀慕雅各的女兒底拿，他深愛這少女，就用甜言蜜語安慰她。

ccb.text: 他恋慕雅各的女儿底娜，就用甜言蜜语讨她欢心。

csbs.text: 示剑的心迷恋雅各的女儿狄娜，他爱那少女，对她说安心话。
